nodes.excerpt: I recently drove a lot of miles (3600) in 7 days and listened to a lot of podcasts which led to a lot of thoughts. The episodes that really struck me on this journey trended along (minus the Ologies episodes) analyzing what one believes, why one believes it, how to live with those beliefs and how…
